button.help: Add more service time to this booking

modal.title: Extend service time
modal.selectDuration: Select the time you want to add:
modal.noOptionsHint: This may be because the maximum number of extensions has been reached, or the booking is not in an eligible status.
modal.notesPlaceholder: e.g. I need more time because...
modal.acceptTerms: I accept the additional payment of ฿{{amount}} for extending the service time, and understand that the payment will be processed immediately after confirmation.
modal.alertSelectDuration: Please select the time you want to add
modal.alertAcceptTerms: Please accept the additional payment terms

payment.title: Extension payment
payment.successRedirect: Taking you back to your booking...
payment.promptpayDesc: Scan QR with your banking app
payment.scanQR: Scan the QR with your banking app to pay
payment.selectBank: Select the bank to pay with
payment.securityNotice: Payment is secured by SSL and Omise
payment.errPaymentFailed: Payment failed. Please try again or contact staff.
payment.errQRFailed: Could not generate QR. Please try again.
payment.errGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
payment.errBankFailed: Could not connect to the bank. Please try again.
payment.errSystemNotReady: The payment system is not ready yet. Please wait a moment.
